overall.description: A cinematic scene from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with a distinctive mohawk sitting on a bench at a sunny futuristic waterfront promenade. The character smokes and observes the surroundings while pedestrians occasionally walk by, then stands up and walks away. The environment features orange canopy structures, palm trees, and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade seating area under orange canopy

events.description: pedestrian with red hair and bandana walks past the bench from right to left
woman in beige jacket walks past from left to right toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: character sits on concrete bench smoking a cigarette and casually observing the promenade activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red mohawk and bandana walks past the seated character
woman in beige jacket and dark pants walks toward the waterfront railing

entered.detail: futuristic orange translucent roof structure with curved support beams
tall vertical digital billboard displaying purple and orange advertisements
row of tall palm trees along the waterfront edge
metal railing separating the promenade from the water
low concrete seating structure where the character is sitting

segments.scene_description: Under the orange canopy of a futuristic waterfront promenade, the character sits on a concrete bench smoking while sunlight casts grid shadows on the pavement. Pedestrians occasionally walk by, including a person with red hair and later a woman in a beige jacket, while palm trees sway in the background near the water.

events.description: character stands up from the concrete bench
character begins walking away from the bench area along the promenade

agents.ego_description: character stands up from the bench and walks away along the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: The character rises from the bench and begins walking away, leaving the orange canopy and digital billboard behind. The camera follows from behind as the character moves along the sunlit concrete promenade toward the open waterfront area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the shaded sanctuary of a futuristic promenade and transitions into an open, sun-drenched waterfront. It begins under an orange canopy where a character sits on a concrete bench smoking, while sunlight filters through the structure to cast grid shadows across the pavement. As pedestrians, including a red-haired individual and a woman in a beige jacket, pass by amidst swaying palm trees, the character eventually rises from the bench. The camera then follows from behind as the character walks away, leaving the canopy and digital billboards behind to move along the concrete path. The scene finally opens up as the character advances toward the bright, expansive waterfront area.
